title: Dōhā 1
original:
śrīguru carana sarōja raja
nija manu mukuru sudhāri
baranau ̐ raghubara bimala jasu
jō dāyaku phala cāri

title: Dōhā 2
original:
buddhihīna tanu jānikē
sumirau ̐ pavanakumāra
bala buddhi bidyā dēhu mōhı ̐
harahu kalēsa bikāra

title: Chaupāī 1
original:
jaya hanumāna jñāna guna sāgara
jaya kapīsa tihu ̐ lōka ujāgara

title: Chaupāī 2
original:
rāma dūta atulita bala dhāmā
añjaniputra pavanasuta nāmā

title: Chaupāī 3
original:
mahābīra bikrama bajaraṅgī
kumati nivāra sumati kē saṅgī

title: Chaupāī 4
original:
kañcana barana birāja subēsā
kānana kuṇḍala kuñcita kēsā

title: Chaupāī 5
original:
hātha bajra au dhvajā birājai
kā̐ dhē mū̐ ja janēū sājai
split_lines: kā̐ | dhē | mū̐ | ja | janēū | sājai

title: Chaupāī 6
original:
saṅkara suvana kēsarīnandana
tēja pratāpa mahā jaga bandana

title: Chaupāī 7
original:
bidyāvāna gunī ati cātura
rāma kāja karibē kō ātura

title: Chaupāī 8
original:
prabhu caritra sunibē kō rasiyā
rāma lakhana sītā mana basiyā

title: Chaupāī 9
original:
sūkṣma rūpa dhari siyahı ̐ dikhāvā
bikaṭa rūpa dhari laṅka jarāvā

title: Chaupāī 10
original:
bhīma rūpa dhari asura sa ̐ hārē
rāmacandra kē kāja sa ̐ vārē
split_lines: bhīma | rūpa | dhari | asura | sa | ̐ | hārē

title: Chaupāī 11
original:
lāya sajīvana lakhana jiyāyē
śrīraghubīra haraṣi ura lāyē

title: Chaupāī 12
original:
raghupati kīnhī bahuta baḍ ̣āī
tuma mama priya bharatahi sama bhāī
split_lines: tuma | mama | priya | bharatahi | sama | bhāī

title: Chaupāī 13
original:
sahasa badana tumharō jasa gāvaı ̐
asa kahi śrīpati kaṇṭha lagāvaı ̐

title: Chaupāī 14
original:
sanakādika brahmādi munīsā
nārada sārada sahita ahīsā

title: Chaupāī 15
original:
jama kubēra digapāla jahā ̐ tē
kabi kōbida kahi sakē kahā ̐ tē
split_lines: kabi | kōbida | kahi | sakē | kahā | ̐ | tē

title: Chaupāī 16
original:
tuma upakāra sugrīvahı ̐ kīnhā
rāma milāya rāja pada dīnhā

title: Chaupāī 17
original:
tumharō mantra bibhīṣana mānā
laṅkēśvara bhaē saba jaga jānā

title: Chaupāī 18
original:
juga sahasra jōjana para bhānū
līlyō tāhi madhura phala jānū

title: Chaupāī 19
original:
prabhu mudrikā mēli mukha māhī ̐
jaladhi lā̐ ghi gayē acaraja nāhī ̐
split_lines: jaladhi | lā̐ | ghi | gayē | acaraja | nāhī | ̐

title: Chaupāī 20
original:
durgama kāja jagata kē jētē
sugama anugraha tumharē tētē

title: Chaupāī 21
original:
rāma duārē tuma rakhavārē
hōta na ājñā binu paisārē

title: Chaupāī 22
original:
saba sukha lahai tumhārī saranā
tuma racchaka kāhū kō ḍaranā

title: Chaupāī 23
original:
āpana tēja samhārō āpai
tīnō̐ lōka hā̐ ka tē̐ kā̐ pai
split_lines: tīnō̐ | lōka | hā̐ | ka | tē̐ | kā̐ | pai

title: Chaupāī 24
original:
bhūta pisāca nikaṭa nahı ̐ āvai
mahābīra jaba nāma sunāvai

title: Chaupāī 25
original:
nāsai rōga harai saba pīrā
japata nirantara hanumata bīrā

title: Chaupāī 26
original:
saṅkaṭa tē̐ hanumāna chuḍ ̣āvai
mana krama bacana dhyāna jō lāvai
split_lines: mana | krama | bacana | dhyāna | jō | lāvai

title: Chaupāī 27
original:
saba para rāma tapasvī rājā
tina kē kāja sakala tuma sājā
split_lines: tina | kē | kāja | sakala | tuma | sājā

title: Chaupāī 28
original:
aura manōratha jō kōī lāvai
sōī amita jīvana phala pāvai

title: Chaupāī 29
original:
cārō̐ juga paratāpa tumhārā
hai parasiddha jagata ujiyārā

title: Chaupāī 30
original:
sādhu santa kē tuma rakhavārē
asura nikandana rāma dulārē

title: Chaupāī 31
original:
aṣṭa siddhi nau nidhi kē dātā
asa bara dīna jānakī mātā
split_lines: aṣṭa | siddhi | nau | nidhi | kē | dātā

title: Chaupāī 32
original:
rāma rasāyana tumharē pāsā
sadā rahō raghupati kē dāsā

title: Chaupāī 33
original:
tumharē bhajana rāma kō pāvai
janama janama kē dukha bisarāvai

title: Chaupāī 34
original:
anta kāla raghubara pura jāī
jahā̐ janma haribhakta kahāī

title: Chaupāī 35
original:
aura dēvatā citta na dharaī
hanumata sēi sarba sukha karaī

title: Chaupāī 36
original:
saṅkaṭa kaṭai miṭai saba pīrā
jō sumirai hanumata balabīrā

title: Chaupāī 37
original:
jai jai jai hanumāna gōsāī ̐
kṛpā karahu guru dēva kī nāī ̐
split_lines: kṛpā | karahu | guru | dēva | kī | nāī | ̐

title: Chaupāī 38
original:
jō sata bāra pāṭha kara kōī
chūṭahi bandi mahā sukha hōī
split_lines: jō | sata | bāra | pāṭha | kara | kōī

title: Chaupāī 39
original:
jō yaha paḍ ̣hai hanumāna cālīsā
hōya siddhi sākhī gaurīsā

title: Chaupāī 40
original:
tulasīdāsa sadā hari cērā
kījai nātha hṛdaya maha ̐ ḍērā

title: Dōhā 3
original:
pavanatanaya saṅkaṭa harana
maṅgala mūrati rūpa
rāma lakhana sītā sahita
hṛdaya basahu sura bhūpa

dēvō naḥ śubhamātanōtu daśadhā nirvartayan bhūmikāṃ
raṅgē dhāmani labdhanirbhararasairadhyakṣitō bhāvukaiḥ
yadbhāvēṣu pṛthagvidhēṣvanuguṇān bhāvān svayaṃ bibhratī
yaddharmairiha dharmiṇī viharatē nānākṛtirnāyikā
split_lines: dēvō | naḥ | śubhamātanōtu | daśadhā | nirvartayan | bhūmikāṃ

original:
nirmagnaśrutijālamārgaṇadaśādattakṣaṇairvīkṣaṇaiḥ
antastanvadivāravindagahanānyaudanvatīnāmapām
niṣpratyūhataraṅgariṅgaṇamithaḥpratyūḍhapāthaśchaṭā -
ḍōlārōhasadōhaḻaṃ bhagavatō mātsyaṃ vapuḥ pātu naḥ
split_lines: ḍōlārōhasadōhaḻaṃ | bhagavatō | mātsyaṃ | vapuḥ | pātu | naḥ

original:
avyāsurbhuvanatrayīmanibhṛtaṃ kaṇḍūyanairadriṇā
nidrāṇasya parasya kūrmavapuṣō niḥśvāsavātōrmayaḥ
yadvikṣēpaṇasaṃskṛtōdadhipayaḥprēṅkhōḻaparyaṅkikā -
nityārōhaṇanirvṛtō viharatē dēvaḥ sahaiva śriyā

gōpāyēdaniśaṃ jaganti kuhanā -
pōtrī pavitrīkṛta -
brahmāṇḍaḥ praḻayōrmighōṣagurubhi -
rghōṇāravairghurghuraiḥ
yaddaṃṣṭrāṅkurakōṭigāḍhaghaṭanā -
niṣkampanityasthitiḥ
brahmastambamasaudasau bhagavatī
mustēva viśvambharā

pratyādiṣṭapurātanapraharaṇagrāmaḥ kṣaṇaṃ pāṇijaiḥ
avyāt trīṇi jagantyakuṇṭhamahimā vaikuṇṭhakaṇṭhīravaḥ
yatprādurbhavanādavandhyajaṭharā yādṛcchikādvēdhasāṃ
yā kācit sahasā mahāsuragṛhasthūṇā pitāmahyabhūt

vrīḍāviddhavadānyadānavayaśōnāsīradhāṭībhaṭaḥ
traiyakṣaṃ makuṭaṃ punannavatu nastraivikramō vikramaḥ
yatprastāvasamucchritadhvajapaṭīvṛttāntasiddhāntibhiḥ
srōtōbhiḥ surasindhuraṣṭasu diśāsaudhēṣu dōdhūyatē

krōdhāgniṃ jamadagnipīḍanabhavaṃ santarpayiṣyan kramāt
akṣatrāmiha santatakṣa ya imāṃ triḥsaptakṛtvaḥ kṣitim
dattvā karmaṇi dakṣiṇāṃ kvacana tāmāskandya sindhuṃ vasan
abrahmaṇyamapākarōtu bhagavānābrahmakīṭaṃ muniḥ
split_lines: akṣatrāmiha | santatakṣa | ya | imāṃ | triḥsaptakṛtvaḥ | kṣitim
dattvā | karmaṇi | dakṣiṇāṃ | kvacana | tāmāskandya | sindhuṃ | vasan

original:
pārāvārapayōviśōṣaṇakalā -
pārīṇakālānala -
jvālājālavihārahāriviśikha -
vyāpāraghōrakramaḥ
sarvāvasthasakṛtprapannajanatā -
saṃrakṣaṇaikavratī
dharmō vigrahavānadharmaviratiṃ
dhanvī sa tanvīta naḥ

phakkatkauravapaṭṭaṇaprabhṛtayaḥ prāstapralambādayaḥ
tālāṅkasya tathāvidhā vihṛtayastanvantu bhadrāṇi naḥ
kṣīraṃ śarkarayēva yābhirapṛthagbhūtāḥ prabhūtairguṇaiḥ
ākaumārakamasvadanta jagatē kṛṣṇasya tāḥ kēlayaḥ

nāthāyaiva namaḥpadaṃ bhavatu naścitraiścaritrakramaiḥ
bhūyōbhirbhuvanānyamūni kuhanāgōpāya gōpāyatē
kāḻindīrasikāya kāḻiyaphaṇisphārasphaṭāvāṭikā -
raṅgōtsaṅgaviśaṅkacaṅkramadhurāparyāyacaryā yatē

bhāvinyā daśayā bhavanniha bhava -
dhvaṃsāya naḥ kalpatāṃ
kalkī viṣṇuyaśassutaḥ kalikathā -
kāluṣyakūlaṅkaṣaḥ
niḥśēṣakṣatakaṇṭakē kṣititalē
dhārājalaughairdhruvaṃ
dharmaṃ kārtayugaṃ prarōhayati ya -
nnistriṃśadhārādharaḥ

icchāmīna vihārakacchapa mahā -
pōtrin yadṛcchāharē
rakṣāvāmana rōṣarāma karuṇā -
kākutstha hēlāhalin
krīḍāvallava kalkavāhanadaśā -
kalkinniti pratyahaṃ
jalpantaḥ puruṣāḥ punanti bhuvanaṃ
puṇyaughapaṇyāpaṇāḥ

vidyōdanvati vēṅkaṭēśvarakavau
jātaṃ jaganmaṅgaḻaṃ
dēvēśasya daśāvatāraviṣayaṃ
stōtraṃ vivakṣēta yaḥ
vaktrē tasya sarasvatī bahumukhī
bhaktiḥ parā mānasē
śuddhiḥ kā’pi tanau diśāsu daśasu
khyātiḥ śubhā jṛmbhatē

title: Verse 1
original:
vasudēva sutaṃ dēvaṃ kaṃsa cāṇūramardanam
dēvakī paramānandaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 2
original:
atasīpuṣpa saṅkāśaṃ hāranūpura śōbhitam
ratnakaṅkaṇa kēyūraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 3
original:
kuṭilālaka saṃyuktaṃ pūrṇa candranibhānanam
vilasatkuṇḍala dharaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 4
original:
mandāra gandhasaṃyuktaṃ cāruhāsaṃ caturbhujam
barhi piñchāva cūḍāṅgaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum
split_lines: barhi | piñchāva | cūḍāṅgaṃ | kṛṣṇaṃ | vandē | jagadgurum

title: Verse 5
original:
utphulla padma patrākṣaṃ nīlajīmūta sannibham
yādavānāṃ śirōratnaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 6
original:
rukmiṇī kēḻisaṃyuktaṃ pītāmbara suśōbhitam
avāpta tulasīgandhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 7
original:
gōpikānāṃ kucadvandva kuṅkumāṅkita vakṣasam
śrīnikētaṃ mahēṣvāsaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 8
original:
śrīvatsāṅkaṃ mahōraskaṃ
vanamālā virājitam
śaṅkha cakradharaṃ dēvaṃ
kṛṣṇaṃ vandē jagadgurum

title: Verse 9
original:
kṛṣṇāṣṭakamidaṃ puṇyaṃ prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭhēt
kōṭi janma kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ smaraṇēna vinaśyati
split_lines: kōṭi | janma | kṛtaṃ | pāpaṃ | smaraṇēna | vinaśyati

original:
namaḥ pannaganaddhāya vaikuṇṭhavaśavartinē
śrutisindhusudhōtpādamandarāya garutmatē

garuḍamakhilavēdanīḍādhirūḍhaṃ dviṣatpīḍanōtkaṇṭhitā -
kuṇṭhavaikuṇṭhapīṭhīkṛtaskandhamīḍē svanīḍāgatiprīta -
rudrāsukīrtistanābhōgagāḍhōpagūḍha sphuratkaṇṭaka -
vrāta vēdhavyathāvēpamāna dvijihvādhipākalpaviṣphārya -
māṇa sphaṭāvāṭikā ratnarōciśchaṭā rājinīrājitaṃ kānti -
kallōlinīrājitam

jaya garuḍa suparṇa darvīkarāhāra dēvādhipāhārahārin
divaukaspatikṣiptadambhōḻidhārākiṇākalpa kalpānta -
vātūla kalpōdayānalpa vīrāyitōdyaccamatkāra daityāri
jaitradhvajārōhanirdhāritōtkarṣa saṅkarṣaṇātman
garutman marutpañcakādhīśa satyādimūrtē na kaścit samastē
namastē punastē namaḥ
split_lines: garutman | marutpañcakādhīśa | satyādimūrtē | na | kaścit | samastē

original:
nama idamajahatsaparyāya paryāyaniryātapakṣānilāsphāla -
nōdvēlapāthōdhi vīcīcapēṭāhatāgādhapātāḻabhāṅkāra -
saṅkruddhanāgēndrapīḍāsṛṇībhāvabhāsvannakhaśrēṇayē
caṇḍatuṇḍāya nṛtyadbhujaṅgabhruvē vajriṇē daṃṣṭrayā
tubhyamadhyātmavidyā vidhēyā vidhēyā bhavaddāsyamāpāda -
yēthā dayēthāśca mē

manuranugata pakṣivaktra sphurattārakastāvakaścitrabhānu -
priyāśēkharastrāyatāṃ nastrivargāpavargaprasūtiḥ paravyōma -
dhāman valadvēṣidarpajvaladvālakhilyapratijñāvatīrṇa
sthirāṃ tattvabuddhiṃ parāṃ bhaktidhēnuṃ jaganmūlakandē
mukundē mahānandadōgdhrīṃ dadhīthā mudhākāmahīnā -
mahīnāmahīnāntaka

ṣaṭtriṃśadgaṇacaraṇō
naraparipāṭīnavīnagumbhagaṇaḥ
viṣṇurathadaṇḍakō’yaṃ
vighaṭayatu vipakṣavāhinīvyūham

vicitrasiddhidaḥ sō’yaṃ vēṅkaṭēśavipaścitā
garuḍadhvajatōṣāya gītō garuḍadaṇḍakaḥ

kavitārkikasiṃhāya kalyāṇaguṇaśālinē Á
śrīmatē vēṅkaṭēśāya vēdāntaguravē namaḥ

title: Verse 1
original:
sphuratsahasrāraśikhātitīvraṃ
sudarśanaṃ bhāskarakōṭitulyam
suradviṣāṃ prāṇavināśi viṣṇōḥ
cakraṃ sadā’haṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadyē

title: Verse 2
original:
viṣṇōrmukhōtthānilapūritasya
yasya dhvanirdānava darpahantā
taṃ pāñcajanyaṃ śaśikōṭiśubhraṃ
śaṅkhaṃ sadā’haṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadyē

title: Verse 3
original:
hiraṇmayīṃ mērusamānasārāṃ
kaumōdakīṃ daityakulaikahantrīm
vaikuṇṭhavāmāgrakarābhimṛṣṭāṃ
gadāṃ sadā’haṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadyē

title: Verse 4
original:
rakṣō’surāṇāṃ kaṭhinōgrakaṇṭha -
cchēdakṣaracchōṇitadigdhadhāram
taṃ nandakaṃ nāma harēḥ pradīptaṃ
khaḍgaṃ sadā’haṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadyē

title: Verse 5
original:
yajjyāninādaśravaṇāt surāṇāṃ
cētāṃsi nirmuktabhayāni sadyaḥ
bhavanti daityāśanibāṇavarṣi
śārṅgaṃ sadā’haṃ śaraṇaṃ prapadyē

title: Verse 6
original:
imaṃ harēḥ pañcamahāyudhānāṃ
stavaṃ paṭhēdyō’nudinaṃ prabhātē
samastaduḥkhāni bhayāni sadyaḥ
pāpāni naśyanti sukhāni santi

title: Verse 7
original:
vanē raṇē śatrujalāgnimadhyē
yadṛcchayāpatsu mahābhayēṣu
idaṃ paṭhan stōtramanākulātmā
sukhī bhavēt tatkṛtasarvarakṣaḥ

title: Verse 1
original:
pratibhaṭaśrēṇibhīṣaṇa varaguṇastōmabhūṣaṇa
janibhayasthānatāraṇa jagadavasthānakāraṇa
nikhiladuṣkarmakarśana nigamasaddharmadarśana
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 2
original:
śubhajagadrūpamaṇḍana suragaṇatrāsakhaṇḍana
śatamakhabrahmavandita śatapathabrahmanandita
prathitavidvatsapakṣita bhajadahirbudhnyalakṣita
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 3
original:
sphuṭataṭijjālapiñjara pṛthutarajvālapañjara
parigatapratnavigraha paṭutaraprajñadurgraha
praharaṇagrāmamaṇḍita parijanatrāṇapaṇḍita
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 4
original:
nijapadaprītasadgaṇa nirupadhisphītaṣaḍguṇa
nigamanirvyūḍhavaibhava nijaparavyūhavaibhava
harihayadvēṣidāraṇa harapuraplōṣakāraṇa
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 5
original:
danujavistārakartana janitamisrāvikartana
danujavidyānikartana bhajadavidyānivartana
amaradṛṣṭasvavikrama samarajuṣṭabhramikrama
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 6
original:
pratimukhālīḍhabandhura pṛthumahāhētidantura
vikaṭamāyābahiṣkṛta vividhamālāpariṣkṛta
sthiramahāyantratantrita dṛḍhadayātantrayantrita
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 7
original:
mahitasaṃpatsadakṣara vihitasaṃpatṣaḍakṣara
ṣaḍaracakrapratiṣṭhita sakalatattvapratiṣṭhita
vividhasaṅkalpakalpaka vibudhasaṅkalpakalpaka
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 8
original:
bhuvananētratrayīmaya savanatējastrayīmaya
niravadhisvāducinmaya nikhilaśaktē jaganmaya
amitaviśvakriyāmaya śamitaviṣvagbhayāmaya
jaya jaya śrīsudarśana jaya jaya śrīsudarśana
split_lines: jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana | jaya | jaya | śrīsudarśana

title: Verse 9
original:
dvicatuṣkamidaṃ prabhūtasāraṃ
paṭhatāṃ vēṅkaṭanāyakapraṇītam
viṣamē’pi manōrathaḥ pradhāvan
na vihanyēta rathāṅgadhuryaguptaḥ

title: Verse 2
original: mantrapuṣpam

title: Verse 4
original: mantrapuṣpam

title: Verse 5
original:
yō॑’pāṃ puṣpa॒ṃ vēda॑
puṣpa॑vān pra॒jāvān paśu॒mān bha॑vati
ca॒ndramā॒ vā a॒pāṃ puṣpam
puṣpa॑vān pra॒jāvān paśu॒mān bha॑vati
ya ē॒vaṃ vēda॑
yō॑’pāmā॒yata॑na॒ṃ vēda॑
ā॒yata॑navān bhavati

title: Verse 6
original:

ā॒yata॑navān bhavati

ā॒yata॑navān bhavati

original:
a॒sau vai tapa॑nna॒pāmā॒yata॑nam
ā॒yata॑navān bhavati
yō॑’muṣya॒ tapa॑ta ā॒yata॑na॒ṃ vēda॑

title: Verse 11
original:
ō-ntadbra̠hma ।
ō-ntadvā̠yuḥ ।
ō-ntadā̠tmā ।
ō-ntathsa̠tyam ।
ō-ntatsarvam ।
ō-ntatpurō̠rnamaḥ ॥

title: Verse 12
original:
antaścharati bhūtē̠ṣu guhāyāṃ viśvamū̠rtiṣu ।
tvaṃ yajñastvaṃ vaṣaṭkārastva-mindrastvagṃ
rudrastvaṃ viṣṇustva-mbrahmatva-mprajā̠patiḥ ।
tva-ntadāpa̠ āpō̠ jyōtī̠rasō̠-'mṛta-mbrahma̠ bhūrbhuva̠ssuva̠rōm ।

title: Verse 13
original:
īśānassarva vidyā̠nāmīśvarassarvabhūtā̠nāṃ
brahmādhipati̠-rbrahma̠ṇō-'dhipati̠-rbrahmā śi̠vō mē astu sadāśi̠vōm ।

title: Verse 14
original:
tadviṣṇōḥ para̠ma-mpa̠dagṃ sadā paśyanti sū̠rayaḥ ।
di̠vīva̠ chakṣu̠rātatam ।
tadviprāsō vipa̠nyavō jāgṛ̠vāgṃ sassamindhatē ।
viṣnō̠ryatpara̠ma-mpa̠dam ।

title: Verse 15
original:
ṛtagṃ sa̠tya-mpara-mbra̠hma̠ pu̠ruṣa-ṅkṛṣṇa̠piṅgalam ।
ū̠rdhvarētaṃ virūpā̠kṣa̠ṃ vi̠śvarūpāya̠ vai namō̠ namaḥ ॥
split_lines: ū̠rdhvarētaṃ virūpā̠kṣa̠ṃ vi̠śvarūpāya̠ vai namō̠ namaḥ

title: Verse 16
original:
ōṃ nā̠rāya̠ṇā̠ya̍ vi̠dmahē̍ vāsudē̠vāya̍ dhīmahi ।
tannō̍ viṣṇuḥ pracō̠dayā̎t ॥

title: Verse 17
original: ōṃ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ
